# llms.txt — Praxura
# https://praxura.de/llms.txt
# A machine-readable overview of Praxura for AI crawlers and LLMs.

# Entity
Praxura is an all-in-one practice management software (Praxissoftware) for German healthcare therapy providers (Heilmittelerbringer). It is a product of InfinityMade (Einzelunternehmen, Yavuz Kemal Demir), based in Siegburg, NRW, Germany. DSGVO-compliant with EU hosting.

# Target audience (practice types)
- Physiotherapie (physiotherapy practices)
- Ergotherapie (occupational therapy practices)
- Logopädie (speech therapy practices)
- Podologie (podiatry practices)

# Key features
1. Online-Terminbuchung — public booking page with services, working hours, employee selection
2. KI-gestützte Rezeptprüfung — AI-assisted prescription (Heilmittelverordnung) scanning and validation
3. §302 SGB V Direktabrechnung (DTA) — prepares direct billing data exchange with the Kostenträger
4. Elektronisches Fahrtenbuch — digital trip log and route planning for home visits (Hausbesuche)
5. Dashboard & Mitarbeiterverwaltung — practice dashboard, multi-employee scheduling and reporting

# Languages supported
German (de), English (en), Turkish (tr)

# Geographic focus
Germany (nationwide), cloud-based SaaS. Operator based in Siegburg, NRW.

# Pricing model
Subscription-based SaaS with tiered plans: Starter (€29/mo), Professional (€49/mo), Klinik (€99/mo). 14-day free trial.

# Contact
- Product: https://praxura.de
- App: https://app.praxura.de
- Email: kontakt@infinitymade.de
- Phone: +49 152 28033834
- Operator / Anbieter: InfinityMade (Einzelunternehmen), Industriestraße 33, 53721 Siegburg, Germany

# Technical stack
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS
- Hosting: Vercel
- Database & Auth: Supabase
- AI / Automation: n8n workflows + Azure AI gateway on Hetzner VPS
- Payments: Stripe
- Calendar API: Custom Node.js/Express on Hetzner VPS

# Important pages
/                — Homepage (Praxura product overview)
/praxis.html     — Detailed product / feature page
/blog/           — Blog with guides for Heilmittelerbringer
/impressum.html  — Imprint (operator: InfinityMade)

/dpa.html        — Data processing agreement (AVV, Art. 28 DSGVO)
